blocks.body: Need / Needn't / Don't have to pomaga mówić o konieczności i braku konieczności bez mylenia ich z zakazem.

{"level":"A2-B1","intro":"W tym temacie zobaczysz, jak mówić o konieczności i braku konieczności za pomocą need to, needn't i don't have to.","rules":[{"label":"NECESSITY","color":"emerald","text":"Need to pokazuje, że coś jest konieczne.","example":"I need to finish this report."},{"label":"NO NECESSITY","color":"blue","text":"Needn't i don't have to pokazują, że dana czynność nie jest konieczna.","example":"You needn't wait. / You don't have to wait."},{"label":"NOT THE SAME AS MUSTN'T","color":"amber","text":"Mustn't = nie wolno. Needn't / don't have to = nie trzeba.","example":"You mustn't touch it. / You don't have to touch it."}]}

{"title":"1. Najważniejsze formy","intro":"Need to zachowuje się jak zwykły czasownik, a needn't działa jak krótka forma modal-like bez to po niej.","items":[{"label":"Necessity","title":"need to / needs to + V","subtitle":"need to leave / needs to study"},{"label":"No necessity","title":"don't / doesn't need to + V","subtitle":"don't need to hurry"},{"label":"Modal-like negative","title":"needn't + V","subtitle":"needn't wait / needn't worry"},{"label":"Common alternative","title":"don't have to + V","subtitle":"don't have to come early"}]}

{"title":"2. Główne zastosowania","sections":[{"label":"Need to = konieczność","color":"emerald","description":"Need to pokazuje, że działanie jest konieczne albo praktycznie potrzebne.","examples":[{"en":"I need to charge my phone.","ua":"Muszę naładować telefon."},{"en":"She needs to speak to the manager.","ua":"Ona musi porozmawiać z menedżerem."},{"en":"Do we need to book a table?","ua":"Czy musimy rezerwować stolik?"}]},{"label":"Needn't i don't have to","color":"blue","description":"Obie formy pokazują brak konieczności. W wielu sytuacjach znaczą prawie to samo.","examples":[{"en":"You needn't bring any food. I've already cooked.","ua":"Nie musisz przynosić jedzenia. Już ugotowałem."},{"en":"You don't have to come early tomorrow.","ua":"Nie musisz jutro przychodzić wcześnie."},{"en":"We needn't rush. There is plenty of time.","ua":"Nie musimy się spieszyć. Mamy dużo czasu."}],"note":"Needn't często brzmi jak krótka modal-like forma; don't have to jest bardzo częste w neutralnej codziennej mowie."},{"label":"Nie myl z mustn't","color":"amber","description":"Jeśli działanie jest zabronione, potrzebujesz mustn't. Jeśli jest po prostu nieobowiązkowe, użyj needn't albo don't have to.","examples":[{"en":"You mustn't park here.","ua":"Nie wolno tu parkować."},{"en":"You don't have to drive. We can walk.","ua":"Nie musisz jechać samochodem. Możemy pójść pieszo."},{"en":"You needn't wash the floor today.","ua":"Nie musisz dziś myć podłogi."}],"note":"To ważna różnica: zakaz i brak konieczności to nie to samo."}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie to po needn't.","wrong":"She needn't to come.","right":"✅ She needn't come.","hint":"Po needn't używamy bare infinitive."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie mustn't, kiedy chodzi tylko o brak konieczności.","wrong":"You mustn't bring food. I already ordered.","right":"✅ You don't have to bring food. I already ordered.","hint":"Jeśli coś jest opcjonalne, to nie jest zakaz."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Zapominanie o formie needs to w trzeciej osobie.","wrong":"He need go now.","right":"✅ He needs to go now.","hint":"Need to zachowuje się jak zwykły czasownik: he needs to...."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótka reguła","items":["Need to = trzeba, jest konieczne.","Needn't = nie trzeba.","Don't have to = też nie trzeba i to bardzo częsta neutralna forma.","Mustn't nie znaczy tego samego: wyraża zakaz, a nie brak obowiązku.","Po needn't używamy base verb, a need to odmienia się jak zwykły czasownik."]}

{"title":"Strony w tym dziale","items":[{"label":"Can / Could","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/can-could","current":false},{"label":"May / Might","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/may-might","current":false},{"label":"Must / Have to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/must-have-to","current":false},{"label":"Should / Ought to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/should-ought-to","current":false},{"label":"Need / Needn't / Don't have to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/need-neednt-dont-have-to","current":true},{"label":"Dedukcja z czasownikami modalnymi","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/modals-of-deduction","current":false},{"label":"Modalne w przeszłości","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/past-modals","current":false},{"label":"Prośby / oferty / sugestie","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/requests-offers-suggestions","current":false}]}
